_comment: Health PEI facility name slugs -> ERstat hospital_id. Source: D1 hospitals table for PE + has_er=1. Five distinct ER hospitals (Queen Elizabeth, Prince County, Kings County Memorial, Western, Souris). The duplicate 'pe_westernhospitalcorpo' in D1 is ignored here; both name variants map to 'pe_westernhospital' as the canonical ID.
_note_d1: D1 has a duplicate Western Hospital row (pe_westernhospitalcorpo) at the same coordinates. Pending cleanup.
